title: lagerstroemia poilanei
intro: Lagerstroemia poilanei is a plant species belonging to the Lythraceae family, commonly known as the crape myrtle or lagerstroemia. This plant is native to Vietnam and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lagerstroemia poilanei include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lagerstroemia poilanei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
